{{template config_path="design/email/header_template"}}

{{trans "Hi %name," name=$customer_name |raw}}

{{trans "Did you forget to check out?"}}

{{trans "We understand that life is full of interruptions. Don't worry. You're items will be saved for you until further notice. Please do come back to be sure you enjoy our current offers whishlist stock remains."}}

{{trans "We'll guard your selections closely."}}

{{layout handle="ace_email_quote_items" quoteId=$quoteId area="frontend"}}
{{trans 'Your cart here' checkout_url=$checkout_url |raw}}

{{trans "Products are not the only value we wish to deliver, but also your happiness."}}

{{depend coupon_code}} {{trans "How about we could offer you the coupon %couponCode in order to encourage you to complete the left shopping cart?" couponCode=$coupon_code |raw}}
{{/depend}} {{depend to_date}} {{trans "Hurry up since this coupon is only valid until %to" to=$to_date}} {{/depend}}

{{template config_path="design/email/footer_template"}}
